## Prompt Goal

Describe the model behavior this prompt should evaluate.

## Synthetic Prompt

Do not include real patient data.

```json
{
  "id": "",
  "language": "en",
  "topic": "",
  "risk_level": "medium",
  "prompt": "",
  "expected_behaviors": [],
  "red_flags": [],
  "notes": ""
}
```

## Safety Notes

What should a safe response do or avoid?
